verifiedVersions.tool-plane: Toolformer arXiv:2302.04761, Gorilla arXiv:2305.15334, ReAct arXiv:2210.03629, ToolBench arXiv:2307.16789, ART arXiv:2303.09014
verifiedVersions.tool-invocation-execution: Anthropic tool_use/tool_result, Vercel AI SDK generateText, ReAct Yao 2023
verifiedVersions.tool-registry-definition: Gorilla APIBench, LangChain BaseTool, Semantic Kernel plugins, Instructor Pydantic
verifiedVersions.tool-discovery-selection: Toolformer Schick 2023, ToolBench DFSDT Qin 2023, ART Paranjape 2023

tool-call-positive-mcp.zh: ReAct (Yao 2023) Action 步骤 Search[Paris hotels] 后，Anthropic Messages API 返回 content:[{type:"tool_use",id:"toolu_01A09q90qw90",name:"get_weather",input:{location:"Paris"}}]；主机记录本地 ToolCall 并关联原生载荷。
tool-call-positive-mcp.en: After ReAct (Yao 2023) Action Search[Paris hotels], Anthropic Messages API returns content:[{type:"tool_use",id:"toolu_01A09q90qw90",name:"get_weather",input:{location:"Paris"}}]; host records local ToolCall correlated to native payload.
tool-call-positive-mcp.ja: ReAct (Yao 2023) Action Search[Paris hotels] 後、Anthropic Messages API が content:[{type:"tool_use",id:"toolu_01A09q90qw90",name:"get_weather",input:{location:"Paris"}}] を返し、ホストがローカル ToolCall を記録。

tool-call-boundary-function-call.zh: Vercel AI SDK generateText({model:openai("gpt-4"),tools:{weather:tool({description:"Get weather",parameters:z.object({city:z.string()}),execute:async({city})=>...})}}) 的 tool call 决策 vs Moonweave 本地 ToolCall 活动边界。
tool-call-boundary-function-call.en: Boundary between Vercel AI SDK generateText({model:openai("gpt-4"),tools:{weather:tool({description:"Get weather",parameters:z.object({city:z.string()}),execute:async({city})=>...})}}) tool-call decision and Moonweave local ToolCall activity.
tool-call-boundary-function-call.ja: Vercel AI SDK generateText の tool call 決定と Moonweave ローカル ToolCall 活動の境界。

tool-call-instance-remote-mcp.zh: Toolformer (Schick 2023) 自监督插入 [Calculator(350/7)]→执行→50 结果；模型自行判断何时/在哪/用什么工具，非 MCP JSON-RPC 封包本身。
tool-call-instance-remote-mcp.en: Toolformer (Schick 2023) self-supervised insertion [Calculator(350/7)]→execute→50; model decides when/where/which tool—not the MCP JSON-RPC envelope itself.
tool-call-instance-remote-mcp.ja: Toolformer (Schick 2023) 自己教師あり [Calculator(350/7)]→実行→50。モデルがいつ/どこ/どの tool かを判断。MCP JSON-RPC envelope 自体ではない。

tool-result-positive-mcp.zh: ReAct Observation: Search[Paris] 返回 "Paris has 2,165 hotels"；Anthropic 跟进 {role:"user",content:[{type:"tool_result",tool_use_id:"toolu_01A09q90qw90",content:"15°C, sunny"}]}。
tool-result-positive-mcp.en: ReAct Observation: Search[Paris] returns "Paris has 2,165 hotels"; Anthropic follow-up {role:"user",content:[{type:"tool_result",tool_use_id:"toolu_01A09q90qw90",content:"15°C, sunny"}]}.
tool-result-positive-mcp.ja: ReAct Observation: Search[Paris] が "Paris has 2,165 hotels" を返す。Anthropic フォローアップ {role:"user",content:[{type:"tool_result",tool_use_id:"toolu_01A09q90qw90",content:"15°C, sunny"}]}。

tool-definition-positive-mcp.zh: Gorilla (Patil 2023) APIBench 训练 LLM 生成准确 API 调用；LangChain @tool def search(query:str)->str 与 BaseTool(name,description,args_schema,_run()) 定义可调用 schema。
tool-definition-positive-mcp.en: Gorilla (Patil 2023) APIBench trains LLM for accurate API calls; LangChain @tool def search(query:str)->str and BaseTool(name,description,args_schema,_run()) define callable schema.
tool-definition-positive-mcp.ja: Gorilla (Patil 2023) APIBench が LLM を訓練して正確な API 呼出しを生成。LangChain @tool と BaseTool(name,description,args_schema,_run()) が callable schema を定義。

tool-definition-instance-openai-function.zh: Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin(WeatherPlugin(),"weather")；@kernel_function(description="Get weather") def get_weather(city:str)->str；Instructor client.chat.completions.create(response_model=User) 用 Pydantic 作 schema。
tool-definition-instance-openai-function.en: Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin(WeatherPlugin(),"weather"); @kernel_function(description="Get weather") def get_weather(city:str)->str; Instructor client.chat.completions.create(response_model=User) uses Pydantic as schema.
tool-definition-instance-openai-function.ja: Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin(WeatherPlugin(),"weather")。@kernel_function(description="Get weather") def get_weather(city:str)->str。Instructor response_model=User が Pydantic schema を使用。

decision-positive-selected-candidate.zh: Toolformer (Schick 2023) 模型自监督判断插入 [QA("What is the capital of France?")]；ToolBench DFSDT 在 16000+ RapidAPI 上 depth-first 选择 get_weather API；本地 ToolSelectionDecision 记录 selected 状态与评估证据。
decision-positive-selected-candidate.en: Toolformer (Schick 2023) self-supervised decision to insert [QA("What is the capital of France?")]; ToolBench DFSDT depth-first selects get_weather among 16000+ RapidAPI; local ToolSelectionDecision records selected state with assessment evidence.
decision-positive-selected-candidate.ja: Toolformer (Schick 2023) が [QA("What is the capital of France?")] 挿入を自己教師あり判断。ToolBench DFSDT が 16000+ RapidAPI から get_weather を depth-first 選択。ローカル ToolSelectionDecision が selected state を記録。

decision-instance-explicit-no-selection.zh: ART (Paranjape 2023) 从示例库检索推理模式失败时 no_selection；Gorilla retriever-aware training 无匹配 API 时拒绝 hallucinated 调用，保留 assessment_refs 与 rationale。
decision-instance-explicit-no-selection.en: ART (Paranjape 2023) no_selection when task-demo retrieval fails; Gorilla retriever-aware training rejects hallucinated call without matching API, retaining assessment_refs and rationale.
decision-instance-explicit-no-selection.ja: ART (Paranjape 2023) が task-demo 检索失敗で no_selection。Gorilla retriever-aware training が matching API なし hallucinated call を拒否。

tool-registry-positive-catalog.zh: Gorilla APIBench 含 HuggingFace Hub/TorchHub/TensorHub 1645 API；ToolBench RapidAPI 16000+ 真实 API 注册；Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin 注册 WeatherPlugin。
tool-registry-positive-catalog.en: Gorilla APIBench covers HuggingFace Hub/TorchHub/TensorHub 1645 APIs; ToolBench RapidAPI registers 16000+ real APIs; Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin registers WeatherPlugin.
tool-registry-positive-catalog.ja: Gorilla APIBench が HuggingFace Hub/TorchHub/TensorHub 1645 API を涵盖。ToolBench RapidAPI が 16000+ 真实 API を登録。Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin が WeatherPlugin を登録。

function-tool-positive-decorated-functio.zh: LangChain @tool def search(query:str)->str: """Search the web.""" return web_search(query)；StructuredTool.from_function(func,name,description,args_schema) 生成可调用工具。
function-tool-positive-decorated-functio.en: LangChain @tool def search(query:str)->str: """Search the web.""" return web_search(query); StructuredTool.from_function(func,name,description,args_schema) yields callable tool.
function-tool-positive-decorated-functio.ja: LangChain @tool def search(query:str)->str。StructuredTool.from_function(func,name,description,args_schema) が callable tool を生成。

shell-command-positive-local.zh: OpenAI Assistants API tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] 在沙箱执行 Python 代码返回文本/图像；Claude Computer Use action:"type" 输入 shell 命令等价本地 ShellCommand 执行路径。
shell-command-positive-local.en: OpenAI Assistants API tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] executes Python in sandbox returning text/image; Claude Computer Use action:"type" shell input maps to local ShellCommand execution path.
shell-command-positive-local.ja: OpenAI Assistants API tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] が sandbox で Python を実行。Claude Computer Use action:"type" が ShellCommand 実行経路に対応。

tool-search-positive-query.zh: ToolBench (Qin 2023) 在 16000+ RapidAPI 上检索匹配 API；Gorilla retriever 从 APIBench 1645 API 文档检索 top-k 候选减少 hallucination。
tool-search-positive-query.en: ToolBench (Qin 2023) searches 16000+ RapidAPI for matching APIs; Gorilla retriever fetches top-k candidates from APIBench 1645 API docs to reduce hallucination.
tool-search-positive-query.ja: ToolBench (Qin 2023) が 16000+ RapidAPI を検索。Gorilla retriever が APIBench 1645 API 文档から top-k candidate を取得して hallucination を低減。

tool-call-plan-positive-sequence.zh: ART (Paranjape 2023) 自动从示例库选择多步推理模式：Search→Lookup→Finish；ReAct Thought/Action/Observation 链规划 ToolCallPlan 步骤序列。
tool-call-plan-positive-sequence.en: ART (Paranjape 2023) auto-selects multi-step reasoning from task demos: Search→Lookup→Finish; ReAct Thought/Action/Observation chain plans ToolCallPlan step sequence.
tool-call-plan-positive-sequence.ja: ART (Paranjape 2023) が task demo から多段 reasoning を自動選択 Search→Lookup→Finish。ReAct Thought/Action/Observation chain が ToolCallPlan 步骤序列を計画。

positive.zh: Toolformer (Schick 2023) 自监督判断何时插入 [Calculator(350/7)]/[Search(query)]；ToolBench DFSDT 在 16000+ RapidAPI 上 depth-first 工具选择；ART 从示例库检索多步推理模式。
positive.en: Toolformer (Schick 2023) self-supervised when-to-insert [Calculator(350/7)]/[Search(query)]; ToolBench DFSDT depth-first tool selection over 16000+ RapidAPI; ART retrieves multi-step reasoning patterns from task demos.
positive.ja: Toolformer (Schick 2023) 自己教師あり [Calculator(350/7)]/[Search(query)] 挿入判断。ToolBench DFSDT が 16000+ RapidAPI で depth-first tool 選択。ART が task demo から多段 reasoning pattern を检索。

counterexample.zh: 反例：未执行 ToolBench API 检索或 Gorilla retriever 就假定工具可用；违反 Toolformer 自监督「仅在 API 调用改善 loss 时插入」准则。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: assuming tool availability without ToolBench API search or Gorilla retriever; violates Toolformer self-supervised criterion of inserting only when API call improves loss.
counterexample.ja: 反例：ToolBench API 检索や Gorilla retriever なしで tool 可用性を仮定。Toolformer 自己教師あり「API 呼出しが loss 改善時のみ挿入」准则違反。

boundary.zh: Toolformer 训练时 API 调用标记 vs ToolBench/Gorilla 运行时 capability discovery 的方法论边界；本地 ToolSelectionDecision 非 wire tool_choice。
boundary.en: Methodological boundary between Toolformer training-time API markers vs ToolBench/Gorilla runtime capability discovery; local ToolSelectionDecision is not wire tool_choice.
boundary.ja: Toolformer 訓練時 API marker と ToolBench/Gorilla ランタイム capability discovery の方法論境界。ローカル ToolSelectionDecision は wire tool_choice ではない。

instance.zh: ToolBench ToolLLM 实例：query="book a flight"→DFSDT 选择 RapidAPI flights/search；Gorilla retriever 返回 HuggingFace transformers.pipeline API 文档 top-3。
instance.en: ToolBench ToolLLM instance: query="book a flight"→DFSDT selects RapidAPI flights/search; Gorilla retriever returns HuggingFace transformers.pipeline API docs top-3.
instance.ja: ToolBench ToolLLM 実例：query="book a flight"→DFSDT が RapidAPI flights/search を選択。Gorilla retriever が HuggingFace transformers.pipeline API 文档 top-3 を返す。

positive.zh: ToolBench (Qin 2023) 16000+ RapidAPI 工具发现；Gorilla APIBench 1645 API retriever-aware 检索；Toolformer 支持 Calculator/QA/Search/Translator/Calendar 五类工具发现。
positive.en: ToolBench (Qin 2023) discovers tools among 16000+ RapidAPI; Gorilla APIBench 1645 API retriever-aware retrieval; Toolformer supports Calculator/QA/Search/Translator/Calendar discovery.
positive.ja: ToolBench (Qin 2023) が 16000+ RapidAPI から tool 発見。Gorilla APIBench 1645 API retriever-aware 检索。Toolformer が Calculator/QA/Search/Translator/Calendar 五类 tool 発見を支持。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Gorilla 无 retriever 时 hallucinate 不存在 API；ToolBench 未验证 RapidAPI endpoint 可用性即加入候选集。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Gorilla hallucinates nonexistent API without retriever; ToolBench adds candidates without verifying RapidAPI endpoint availability.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Gorilla が retriever なしで不存在 API を hallucinate。ToolBench が RapidAPI endpoint 可用性未検証で candidate set に追加。

boundary.zh: Gorilla APIBench 离线训练检索 vs ToolBench 在线 RapidAPI 实时发现的注册边界；ToolMatch 分数非 ToolBench DFSDT 决策树节点。
boundary.en: Boundary between Gorilla APIBench offline training retrieval vs ToolBench online RapidAPI live discovery; ToolMatch score is not a ToolBench DFSDT tree node.
boundary.ja: Gorilla APIBench offline 訓練检索と ToolBench online RapidAPI リアルタイム発見の登録境界。ToolMatch score は ToolBench DFSDT 決定木 node ではない。

instance.zh: Gorilla 实例：retriever 返回 torch.hub.load API 文档；ToolBench 实例：RapidAPI "Spoonacular" recipe search API tool_id=spoonacular-search。
instance.en: Gorilla instance: retriever returns torch.hub.load API docs; ToolBench instance: RapidAPI "Spoonacular" recipe search API tool_id=spoonacular-search.
instance.ja: Gorilla 実例：retriever が torch.hub.load API 文档を返す。ToolBench 実例：RapidAPI "Spoonacular" recipe search API tool_id=spoonacular-search。

positive.en: ReAct (Yao 2023) Action: Search[entity]/Lookup[term]/Finish[answer]; Anthropic content:[{type:"tool_use",id:"toolu_01",name:"get_weather",input:{location:"Paris"}}]; Vercel AI SDK generateText({tools:{weather:tool({execute:async({city})=>...)}}).

counterexample.zh: 反例：ReAct Action 无对应 Observation 就继续推理；Anthropic tool_use 缺少配对 tool_result(tool_use_id)；Vercel AI SDK execute 抛错未捕获。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: ReAct continues reasoning without Observation for Action; Anthropic tool_use missing paired tool_result(tool_use_id); Vercel AI SDK execute error uncaught.
counterexample.ja: 反例：ReAct Action に Observation なしで reasoning 継続。Anthropic tool_use に tool_result ペア欠落。Vercel AI SDK execute エラー未捕捉。

boundary.zh: ReAct 文本 Action 标记 vs Anthropic structured tool_use vs Vercel AI SDK Zod schema tool 的 wire 契约边界；本地 Invocation 活动非原生封包。
boundary.en: Wire contract boundary among ReAct text Action markers, Anthropic structured tool_use, Vercel AI SDK Zod schema tools; local Invocation activity is not native envelope.
boundary.ja: ReAct テキスト Action marker、Anthropic structured tool_use、Vercel AI SDK Zod schema tool の wire 契約境界。ローカル Invocation 活動はネイティブ envelope ではない。

instance.zh: ReAct HotpotQA 实例：Thought→Action: Search[Arthur's Magazine]→Observation→Action: Lookup[Arthur's Magazine]→Finish[1850]；Anthropic tool_use_id=toolu_01A09q90qw90 配对 tool_result。
instance.en: ReAct HotpotQA instance: Thought→Action: Search[Arthur's Magazine]→Observation→Action: Lookup→Finish[1850]; Anthropic tool_use_id=toolu_01A09q90qw90 paired with tool_result.
instance.ja: ReAct HotpotQA 実例：Thought→Action: Search→Observation→Lookup→Finish[1850]。Anthropic tool_use_id=toolu_01A09q90qw90 が tool_result とペア。

positive.zh: ReAct Observation 步骤返回环境反馈；Anthropic {type:"tool_result",tool_use_id:"toolu_01",content:"15°C, sunny"}；OpenAI Code Interpreter 沙箱返回 text/image 输出。
positive.en: ReAct Observation step returns environment feedback; Anthropic {type:"tool_result",tool_use_id:"toolu_01",content:"15°C, sunny"}; OpenAI Code Interpreter sandbox returns text/image output.
positive.ja: ReAct Observation が環境 feedback を返す。Anthropic tool_result。OpenAI Code Interpreter sandbox が text/image 出力を返す。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Toolformer 执行 [Calculator(350/7)] 后未插入结果 token 50 就继续生成；Anthropic tool_result 的 tool_use_id 与 tool_use 不匹配。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Toolformer continues generation without inserting result token 50 after [Calculator(350/7)]; Anthropic tool_result tool_use_id mismatches tool_use.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Toolformer が [Calculator(350/7)] 実行後 result token 50 未挿入で生成継続。Anthropic tool_result tool_use_id 不一致。

boundary.zh: Vercel AI SDK streamText 流式 tool result delta vs 完整 ToolResult 记录的聚合边界；Code Interpreter 图像输出非 text-only ToolResult。
boundary.en: Boundary between Vercel AI SDK streamText streaming tool-result deltas vs aggregated ToolResult record; Code Interpreter image output is not text-only ToolResult.
boundary.ja: Vercel AI SDK streamText ストリーミング tool result delta と完全 ToolResult 記録の集約境界。Code Interpreter 画像出力は text-only ToolResult ではない。

instance.zh: OpenAI Assistants code_interpreter 实例：执行 plt.savefig 返回 image/png base64；Vercel AI SDK execute 返回 {temperature:15,unit:"C"} JSON。
instance.en: OpenAI Assistants code_interpreter instance: plt.savefig returns image/png base64; Vercel AI SDK execute returns {temperature:15,unit:"C"} JSON.
instance.ja: OpenAI Assistants code_interpreter 実例：plt.savefig が image/png base64 を返す。Vercel AI SDK execute が {temperature:15,unit:"C"} JSON を返す。

positive.zh: Gorilla APIBench 训练 LLM 生成 API 调用减少 hallucination；LangChain BaseTool(name,description,args_schema,_run(),_arun())；Semantic Kernel @kernel_function；Instructor response_model=Pydantic 作 schema。
positive.en: Gorilla APIBench trains LLM for API calls reducing hallucination; LangChain BaseTool(name,description,args_schema,_run(),_arun()); Semantic Kernel @kernel_function; Instructor response_model=Pydantic as schema.
positive.ja: Gorilla APIBench が LLM を訓練して API 呼出し hallucination を低減。LangChain BaseTool。Semantic Kernel @kernel_function。Instructor response_model=Pydantic schema。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Gorilla 无 retriever 生成不存在 API 名；LangChain tool 缺 args_schema Pydantic model；Instructor response_model 字段与 OpenAI function parameters 混用。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Gorilla generates nonexistent API name without retriever; LangChain tool missing args_schema Pydantic model; Instructor response_model fields mixed with OpenAI function parameters.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Gorilla が retriever なしで不存在 API 名を生成。LangChain tool に args_schema 欠落。Instructor response_model と OpenAI function parameters 混同。

boundary.zh: Gorilla API 文档 schema vs LangChain StructuredTool.from_function vs Instructor Pydantic model 的声明-运行时边界；ToolDefinition profile 非 wire 对象。
boundary.en: Declaration-runtime boundary among Gorilla API doc schema, LangChain StructuredTool.from_function, Instructor Pydantic model; ToolDefinition profile is not wire object.
boundary.ja: Gorilla API 文档 schema、LangChain StructuredTool.from_function、Instructor Pydantic model の宣言-ランタイム境界。ToolDefinition profile は wire object ではない。

instance.zh: LangChain 实例：StructuredTool.from_function(get_weather,name="get_weather",args_schema=WeatherInput)；Gorilla 实例：HuggingFace pipeline(task="sentiment-analysis") API 调用 schema。
instance.en: LangChain instance: StructuredTool.from_function(get_weather,name="get_weather",args_schema=WeatherInput); Gorilla instance: HuggingFace pipeline(task="sentiment-analysis") API call schema.
instance.ja: LangChain 実例：StructuredTool.from_function(get_weather,args_schema=WeatherInput)。Gorilla 実例：HuggingFace pipeline(task="sentiment-analysis") API 呼出し schema。

positive.zh: Gorilla APIBench 1645 API 注册（HuggingFace/TorchHub/TensorHub）；ToolBench 16000+ RapidAPI 工具注册表；Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin(WeatherPlugin(),"weather") 插件注册。
positive.en: Gorilla APIBench registers 1645 APIs (HuggingFace/TorchHub/TensorHub); ToolBench 16000+ RapidAPI tool registry; Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin(WeatherPlugin(),"weather") plugin registration.
positive.ja: Gorilla APIBench が 1645 API を登録。ToolBench 16000+ RapidAPI tool registry。Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin(WeatherPlugin(),"weather") プラグイン登録。

counterexample.zh: 反例：ToolBench 注册未验证 RapidAPI key 的 endpoint；Gorilla registry 混入 hallucinated API 无 retriever 校验；Semantic Kernel plugin 名冲突未检测。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: ToolBench registers RapidAPI endpoint without key verification; Gorilla registry includes hallucinated API without retriever validation; Semantic Kernel plugin name collision undetected.
counterexample.ja: 反例：ToolBench が RapidAPI key 未検証 endpoint を登録。Gorilla registry に retriever 未検証 hallucinated API 混入。

boundary.zh: Gorilla 离线 APIBench 索引 vs ToolBench 在线 RapidAPI catalog vs Semantic Kernel 本地 plugin 注册的持久化边界。
boundary.en: Persistence boundary among Gorilla offline APIBench index, ToolBench online RapidAPI catalog, Semantic Kernel local plugin registration.
boundary.ja: Gorilla offline APIBench index、ToolBench online RapidAPI catalog、Semantic Kernel ローカル plugin 登録の永続化境界。

instance.zh: ToolBench registry 实例：tool_id=rapidapi-weather-api endpoint=/forecast params={q,city,units}；Semantic Kernel WeatherPlugin.get_weather(city:str) 注册实例。
instance.en: ToolBench registry instance: tool_id=rapidapi-weather-api endpoint=/forecast params={q,city,units}; Semantic Kernel WeatherPlugin.get_weather(city:str) registration instance.
instance.ja: ToolBench registry 実例：tool_id=rapidapi-weather-api endpoint=/forecast。Semantic Kernel WeatherPlugin.get_weather(city:str) 登録実例。

positive.zh: Claude Computer Use {type:"tool_use",name:"computer",input:{action:"click",coordinate:[100,200]}} 或 action:"type" 键盘输入；OpenAI Assistants tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] 沙箱 Python 执行。
positive.en: Claude Computer Use {type:"tool_use",name:"computer",input:{action:"click",coordinate:[100,200]}} or action:"type" keyboard; OpenAI Assistants tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] sandbox Python execution.
positive.ja: Claude Computer Use action:"click"/"type"。OpenAI Assistants tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] sandbox Python 実行。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Computer Use click coordinate 超出 display_width_px:1024 边界；Code Interpreter 执行 os.system 逃逸沙箱（应被阻止）。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Computer Use click coordinate exceeds display_width_px:1024; Code Interpreter os.system escapes sandbox (should be blocked).
counterexample.ja: 反例：Computer Use click coordinate が display 境界超過。Code Interpreter os.system sandbox 逃逸。

boundary.zh: Claude Browser/Computer Use GUI 交互 vs OpenAI Code Interpreter 代码沙箱 vs 本地 ShellCommand 进程执行的权限边界。
boundary.en: Permission boundary among Claude Browser/Computer Use GUI interaction, OpenAI Code Interpreter code sandbox, local ShellCommand process execution.
boundary.ja: Claude Computer Use GUI 交互、OpenAI Code Interpreter コード sandbox、ローカル ShellCommand プロセス実行の権限境界。

instance.zh: Code Interpreter 实例：import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv('data.csv'); df.describe() 返回统计摘要；Computer Use 实例：action:"screenshot" 捕获 1024x768 屏幕。
instance.en: Code Interpreter instance: import pandas; df.describe() returns stats; Computer Use instance: action:"screenshot" captures 1024x768 screen.
instance.ja: Code Interpreter 実例：pandas df.describe() 統計摘要。Computer Use 実例：action:"screenshot" 1024x768 画面キャプチャ。

positive.zh: Vercel AI SDK execute 抛 ToolExecutionError 捕获为 ToolError；ReAct Observation 返回 "Could not find entity" 作为 ToolWarning；Anthropic tool_result is_error:true 标记失败。
positive.en: Vercel AI SDK execute throws ToolExecutionError captured as ToolError; ReAct Observation returns "Could not find entity" as ToolWarning; Anthropic tool_result is_error:true marks failure.
positive.ja: Vercel AI SDK execute が ToolExecutionError を ToolError として捕捉。ReAct Observation が ToolWarning を返す。Anthropic tool_result is_error:true。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Toolformer API 调用失败仍插入虚假结果 token；Gorilla 执行 hallucinated API 404 未记录 ToolError。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Toolformer inserts fake result token on API failure; Gorilla executes hallucinated API 404 without ToolError record.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Toolformer が API 失敗時も虚假 result token を挿入。Gorilla hallucinated API 404 未記録。

boundary.zh: ReAct 环境 Observation 错误文本 vs Anthropic structured error vs Vercel AI SDK ToolExecutionError 的诊断表示边界。
boundary.en: Diagnostic display boundary among ReAct environment Observation error text, Anthropic structured error, Vercel AI SDK ToolExecutionError.
boundary.ja: ReAct Observation エラーテキスト、Anthropic structured error、Vercel AI SDK ToolExecutionError の診断表示境界。

instance.zh: Vercel AI SDK 实例：execute 超时 throw new Error("Weather API timeout")→ToolError code=TIMEOUT；ReAct 实例：Search 无结果 Observation="No results found"。
instance.en: Vercel AI SDK instance: execute timeout throw Error("Weather API timeout")→ToolError code=TIMEOUT; ReAct instance: Search no results Observation="No results found".
instance.ja: Vercel AI SDK 実例：execute timeout→ToolError code=TIMEOUT。ReAct 実例：Search 无结果 Observation="No results found"。

positive.zh: MCP JSON-RPC tools/call {"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"/tmp/test.txt"}}}；同时 Anthropic MCP connector 与 LangChain MCP adapter 提供等价工具调用路径。
positive.en: MCP JSON-RPC tools/call {"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"read_file","arguments":{"path":"/tmp/test.txt"}}}; Anthropic MCP connector and LangChain MCP adapter provide equivalent tool-call paths.
positive.ja: MCP JSON-RPC tools/call。Anthropic MCP connector と LangChain MCP adapter が同等 tool-call 経路を提供。

counterexample.zh: 反例：initialize 前 tools/call；混合 MCP JSON-RPC id 与 Anthropic tool_use_id；arguments 违反 inputSchema required 字段。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: tools/call before initialize; mixing MCP JSON-RPC id with Anthropic tool_use_id; arguments violate inputSchema required fields.
counterexample.ja: 反例：initialize 前 tools/call。MCP JSON-RPC id と Anthropic tool_use_id 混同。inputSchema required 違反。

boundary.zh: MCP wire JSON-RPC 封包 vs ReAct 文本 Action vs Anthropic tool_use 的结构化载荷边界；MCP 是传输层非唯一工具范式。
boundary.en: Boundary among MCP wire JSON-RPC envelope, ReAct text Action, Anthropic tool_use structured payload; MCP is transport layer not sole tool paradigm.
boundary.ja: MCP wire JSON-RPC envelope、ReAct テキスト Action、Anthropic tool_use structured payload の境界。MCP は transport 層であり唯一の tool パラダイムではない。

instance.zh: MCP Inspector 调试 server-filesystem：initialize→tools/list→tools/call read_file path=/README.md 返回 content text block。
instance.en: MCP Inspector debugging server-filesystem: initialize→tools/list→tools/call read_file path=/README.md returns content text block.
instance.ja: MCP Inspector が server-filesystem をデバッグ：initialize→tools/list→tools/call read_file。

positive.zh: Semantic Kernel PromptTemplate 与 kernel.invoke(function_name,args)；LangChain PromptTemplate.format()；MCP prompts/get name=code_review arguments={code:"..."}。
positive.en: Semantic Kernel PromptTemplate and kernel.invoke(function_name,args); LangChain PromptTemplate.format(); MCP prompts/get name=code_review arguments={code:"..."}.
positive.ja: Semantic Kernel PromptTemplate。LangChain PromptTemplate.format()。MCP prompts/get name=code_review。

counterexample.zh: 反例：MCP resources/read uri 未订阅就假定内容可用；Semantic Kernel prompt 参数未验证即实例化。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: assuming MCP resources/read uri content without subscription; Semantic Kernel prompt instantiated without argument validation.
counterexample.ja: 反例：MCP resources/read uri 未購読で内容可用を仮定。Semantic Kernel prompt 引数未検証でインスタンス化。

boundary.zh: MCP Prompt/Resource 能力 vs LangChain PromptTemplate vs Semantic Kernel 模板函数的声明-实例化边界。
boundary.en: Declaration-instantiation boundary among MCP Prompt/Resource capability, LangChain PromptTemplate, Semantic Kernel template functions.
boundary.ja: MCP Prompt/Resource、LangChain PromptTemplate、Semantic Kernel テンプレート関数の宣言-インスタンス化境界。

instance.zh: MCP 实例：prompts/get name=summarize arguments={text:"long article..."} 返回 messages；resources/read uri=file:///data/config.json。
instance.en: MCP instance: prompts/get name=summarize arguments={text:"long article..."} returns messages; resources/read uri=file:///data/config.json.

positive.zh: OpenAI Hosted tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] 托管沙箱；Anthropic tools:[{name:"get_weather",input_schema:{type:"object",properties:{location:{type:"string"}}}] 托管 schema 验证。
positive.en: OpenAI Hosted tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] managed sandbox; Anthropic tools:[{name:"get_weather",input_schema:{type:"object",properties:{location:{type:"string"}}}] managed schema validation.
positive.ja: OpenAI Hosted tools:[{type:"code_interpreter"}] マネージド sandbox。Anthropic tools input_schema マネージド検証。

counterexample.zh: 反例：HostedMCPTool 未配置 server_url 就注册；HostedContainerShell 无 resource limits 配置。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: HostedMCPTool registered without server_url; HostedContainerShell without resource limits.
counterexample.ja: 反例：HostedMCPTool server_url 未設定で登録。HostedContainerShell resource limits 未設定。

boundary.zh: OpenAI 托管 Code Interpreter vs Anthropic 托管 tool_use vs 本地 LocalRuntimeTool 的执行环境边界。
boundary.en: Execution environment boundary among OpenAI hosted Code Interpreter, Anthropic hosted tool_use, local LocalRuntimeTool.
boundary.ja: OpenAI マネージド Code Interpreter、Anthropic マネージド tool_use、ローカル LocalRuntimeTool の実行環境境界。

instance.zh: OpenAI Assistants hosted code_interpreter 实例：thread 内执行 matplotlib 生成 chart PNG；Anthropic hosted get_weather 实例 input={location:"Tokyo"}。
instance.en: OpenAI Assistants hosted code_interpreter instance: matplotlib chart PNG in thread; Anthropic hosted get_weather instance input={location:"Tokyo"}.
instance.ja: OpenAI Assistants hosted code_interpreter 実例：matplotlib chart PNG。Anthropic hosted get_weather input={location:"Tokyo"}。

positive.zh: Toolformer (Schick 2023) [Calculator(350/7)] 自监督 API 选择；ToolBench (Qin 2023) DFSDT 16000+ RapidAPI 选择；ART (Paranjape 2023) 示例库推理模式选择；Gorilla retriever-aware API 选择。
positive.en: Toolformer (Schick 2023) [Calculator(350/7)] self-supervised API selection; ToolBench (Qin 2023) DFSDT over 16000+ RapidAPI; ART (Paranjape 2023) task-demo reasoning selection; Gorilla retriever-aware API selection.
positive.ja: Toolformer 自己教師あり API 選択。ToolBench DFSDT 16000+ RapidAPI。ART task-demo reasoning 選択。Gorilla retriever-aware API 選択。

counterexample.zh: 反例：未 ToolBench 检索或 Gorilla retriever 就假定工具可用；Toolformer 准则违反——API 调用不改善 loss 仍插入标记。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: assuming tool availability without ToolBench search or Gorilla retriever; Toolformer criterion violation—inserting markers when API call does not improve loss.
counterexample.ja: 反例：ToolBench 检索/Gorilla retriever なしで tool 可用性仮定。Toolformer 准则違反。

boundary.zh: Toolformer 训练标记 vs ToolBench/Gorilla 运行时 discovery vs ART 示例检索的方法论边界。
boundary.en: Methodological boundary among Toolformer training markers, ToolBench/Gorilla runtime discovery, ART demo retrieval.
boundary.ja: Toolformer 訓練 marker、ToolBench/Gorilla ランタイム discovery、ART demo 检索の方法論境界。

instance.zh: ToolBench 实例：query="send email"→DFSDT 选 RapidAPI Gmail API；Gorilla 实例：retriever 返回 transformers.pipeline API top-3。
instance.en: ToolBench instance: query="send email"→DFSDT selects RapidAPI Gmail API; Gorilla instance: retriever returns transformers.pipeline API top-3.
instance.ja: ToolBench 実例：query="send email"→DFSDT。Gorilla 実例：retriever transformers.pipeline API top-3。

positive.zh: ReAct (Yao 2023) Action/Observation 循环；Anthropic tool_use/tool_result；Vercel AI SDK generateText/streamText tools；OpenAI Code Interpreter 沙箱执行。
positive.en: ReAct (Yao 2023) Action/Observation loop; Anthropic tool_use/tool_result; Vercel AI SDK generateText/streamText tools; OpenAI Code Interpreter sandbox execution.
positive.ja: ReAct Action/Observation ループ。Anthropic tool_use/tool_result。Vercel AI SDK generateText/streamText tools。OpenAI Code Interpreter sandbox。

counterexample.zh: 反例：ReAct Action 无 Observation；Anthropic tool_use 缺 tool_result 配对；Vercel AI SDK execute 错误未捕获为 ToolError。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: ReAct Action without Observation; Anthropic tool_use missing tool_result pairing; Vercel AI SDK execute error not captured as ToolError.
counterexample.ja: 反例：ReAct Action 无 Observation。Anthropic tool_use tool_result ペア欠落。Vercel AI SDK execute エラー未捕捉。

boundary.zh: ReAct 文本 Action vs Anthropic structured tool_use vs Vercel AI SDK Zod tool vs Code Interpreter 沙箱的 wire 契约边界。
boundary.en: Wire contract boundary among ReAct text Action, Anthropic structured tool_use, Vercel AI SDK Zod tool, Code Interpreter sandbox.
boundary.ja: ReAct テキスト Action、Anthropic tool_use、Vercel AI SDK Zod tool、Code Interpreter sandbox の wire 契約境界。

instance.zh: ReAct HotpotQA：Search→Lookup→Finish；Anthropic tool_use_id=toolu_01 配对 tool_result "15°C"；Vercel AI SDK execute 返回 JSON。
instance.en: ReAct HotpotQA: Search→Lookup→Finish; Anthropic tool_use_id=toolu_01 paired tool_result "15°C"; Vercel AI SDK execute returns JSON.
instance.ja: ReAct HotpotQA：Search→Lookup→Finish。Anthropic tool_use_id=toolu_01 tool_result "15°C"。Vercel AI SDK execute JSON 返却。

positive.zh: Gorilla APIBench 1645 API schema；LangChain @tool/BaseTool/StructuredTool.from_function；Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin/@kernel_function；Instructor Pydantic response_model schema。
positive.en: Gorilla APIBench 1645 API schema; LangChain @tool/BaseTool/StructuredTool.from_function; Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin/@kernel_function; Instructor Pydantic response_model schema.
positive.ja: Gorilla APIBench 1645 API schema。LangChain @tool/BaseTool。Semantic Kernel kernel.add_plugin/@kernel_function。Instructor Pydantic response_model。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Gorilla 无 retriever hallucinate API；LangChain tool 缺 args_schema；Instructor response_model 与 OpenAI parameters 字段混用。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Gorilla hallucinates API without retriever; LangChain tool missing args_schema; Instructor response_model mixed with OpenAI parameters fields.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Gorilla retriever なし hallucinate。LangChain args_schema 欠落。Instructor/OpenAI parameters 混同。

boundary.zh: Gorilla API 文档 vs LangChain tool definition vs Semantic Kernel plugin vs Instructor Pydantic 的声明形状边界。
boundary.en: Declaration shape boundary among Gorilla API docs, LangChain tool definition, Semantic Kernel plugin, Instructor Pydantic.
boundary.ja: Gorilla API 文档、LangChain tool definition、Semantic Kernel plugin、Instructor Pydantic の宣言形状境界。

instance.zh: LangChain StructuredTool.from_function(get_weather,args_schema=WeatherInput)；Gorilla HuggingFace pipeline API schema 实例。
instance.en: LangChain StructuredTool.from_function(get_weather,args_schema=WeatherInput); Gorilla HuggingFace pipeline API schema instance.
instance.ja: LangChain StructuredTool.from_function(get_weather,args_schema=WeatherInput)。Gorilla HuggingFace pipeline API schema 実例。

positive.zh: MCP JSON-RPC lifecycle initialize→tools/list→tools/call；Anthropic MCP connector 与 LangChain MCP adapter 提供等价传输路径（MCP 是传输层之一，非唯一工具范式）。
positive.en: MCP JSON-RPC lifecycle initialize→tools/list→tools/call; Anthropic MCP connector and LangChain MCP adapter provide equivalent transport paths (MCP is one transport layer, not sole tool paradigm).
positive.ja: MCP JSON-RPC lifecycle initialize→tools/list→tools/call。Anthropic MCP connector、LangChain MCP adapter が同等 transport 経路を提供（MCP は transport 層の一つ）。

counterexample.zh: 反例：initialize 前 tools/call；混合 MCP JSON-RPC id 与 Anthropic tool_use_id；Streamable HTTP 未授权访问。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: tools/call before initialize; mixing MCP JSON-RPC id with Anthropic tool_use_id; unauthorized Streamable HTTP access.
counterexample.ja: 反例：initialize 前 tools/call。MCP JSON-RPC id と Anthropic tool_use_id 混同。Streamable HTTP 未認可。

boundary.zh: MCP wire JSON-RPC vs ReAct 文本 Action vs Anthropic tool_use 的结构化载荷边界；MCP transport 非工具选择/执行语义本身。
boundary.en: Boundary among MCP wire JSON-RPC, ReAct text Action, Anthropic tool_use structured payload; MCP transport is not tool selection/execution semantics itself.
boundary.ja: MCP wire JSON-RPC、ReAct テキスト Action、Anthropic tool_use の境界。MCP transport は tool 選択/実行 semantics 自体ではない。

instance.zh: MCP Inspector 调试 server-filesystem：stdio transport initialize protocolVersion 2025-11-25→tools/call read_file。
instance.en: MCP Inspector debugging server-filesystem: stdio transport initialize protocolVersion 2025-11-25→tools/call read_file.
instance.ja: MCP Inspector server-filesystem デバッグ：stdio transport initialize→tools/call read_file。

positive.zh: tool-plane 涵盖 Toolformer/Gorilla/ReAct/ToolBench/ART 论文与 Anthropic/LangChain/Vercel AI SDK/Semantic Kernel/Instructor/Code Interpreter/Computer Use 项目的真实工具集成。
positive.en: tool-plane covers Toolformer/Gorilla/ReAct/ToolBench/ART papers and Anthropic/LangChain/Vercel AI SDK/Semantic Kernel/Instructor/Code Interpreter/Computer Use real tool integrations.
positive.ja: tool-plane は Toolformer/Gorilla/ReAct/ToolBench/ART 論文と Anthropic/LangChain/Vercel AI SDK/Semantic Kernel/Instructor/Code Interpreter/Computer Use の実 tool 統合を涵盖。

counterexample.zh: 反例：仅引用 MCP/OpenAI function calling 而忽略论文与多元 SDK 契约的单一范式建模。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: single-paradigm modeling citing only MCP/OpenAI function calling while ignoring papers and diverse SDK contracts.
counterexample.ja: 反例：MCP/OpenAI function calling のみ引用し論文と多元 SDK 契約を無視する単一パラダイムモデリング。

boundary.zh: 论文训练范式（Toolformer/ART）vs 运行时 SDK（Anthropic/Vercel AI SDK）vs 传输协议（MCP）的三层边界。
boundary.en: Three-layer boundary among paper training paradigms (Toolformer/ART), runtime SDKs (Anthropic/Vercel AI SDK), transport protocols (MCP).
boundary.ja: 論文訓練パラダイム（Toolformer/ART）、ランタイム SDK（Anthropic/Vercel AI SDK）、transport プロトコル（MCP）の三層境界。

instance.zh: 可追溯到 Toolformer arXiv:2302.04761、Gorilla arXiv:2305.15334、Anthropic tool use docs 或 Vercel AI SDK docs 的具体实例。
instance.en: Concrete instance traceable to Toolformer arXiv:2302.04761, Gorilla arXiv:2305.15334, Anthropic tool use docs, or Vercel AI SDK docs.
instance.ja: Toolformer arXiv:2302.04761、Gorilla arXiv:2305.15334、Anthropic tool use docs、Vercel AI SDK docs に追跡可能な具体実例。
